chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ جَهِلَ أَنْ يَقِفَ بِالْمَشْعَرِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 169 – The one who is ignorant that he should be pausing at the Monuments

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/133)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/133)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ إِنَّ صَاحِبَيَّ هَذَيْنِ جَهِلَا أَنْ يَقِفَا بِالْمُزْدَلِفَةِ فَقَالَ يَرْجِعَانِ مَكَانَهُمَا فَيَقِفَانِ بِالْمَشْعَرِ سَاعَةً

قُلْتُ فَإِنَّهُ لَمْ يُخْبِرْهُمَا أَحَدٌ حَتَّى كَانَ الْيَوْمُ وَ قَدْ نَفَرَ النَّاسُ قَالَ فَنَكَسَ رَأْسَهُ سَاعَةً ثُمَّ قَالَ أَ لَيْسَا قَدْ صَلَّيَا الْغَدَاةَ بِالْمُزْدَلِفَةِ قُلْتُ بَلَى فَقَالَ أَ لَيْسَا قَدْ قَنَتَا فِي صَلَاتِهِمَا قُلْتُ بَلَى فَقَالَ تَمَّ حَجُّهُمَا ثُمَّ قَالَ الْمَشْعَرُ مِنَ الْمُزْدَلِفَةِ وَ الْمُزْدَلِفَةُ مِنَ الْمَشْعَرِ وَ إِنَّمَا يَكْفِيهِمَا الْيَسِيرُ مِنَ الدُّعَاءِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Ibn Muskan, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! There two companions of mine who were ignorant (of the fact) that they should be pausing at Muzdalifa’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘They should both go back to their places, and they should pause at the Monuments for a while’.

I said, ‘But no one informed them until today, and the people have left’. So he<sup>asws</sup> lowered his<sup>asws</sup> head for a while, then said: ‘Is it not so that both of them had Prayed the morning (Prayer) at Al-Muzdalifa?’ I said, ‘Yes’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Is it not so that they had both performed Qunoot in their Prayer?’ I said, ‘Yes’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Their Hajj is complete’. Then he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The Monuments are from Al-Muzdalifa, and Al-Muzdalifa is from the Monuments. But rather, a little from the supplication would suffice them’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Sinan from ibn Muskan from abu Basir who has said the following: “I once said to abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘I pray to Allah to keep my soul in service for your cause, these two of my friends due to ignorance have not stayed in al-Muzdalifah. He (the Imam) said, ‘They must go back to stay in al-Mash‘ar for an hour . 5 I then said that no one told them about it until today and people have already left. He (the Imam) then looked down for a while and said, ‘Did they perform the morning Salat (prayer) in al-Muzdalifah . 5 I said, ‘Yes, they did . 5 He (the Imam) asked, ‘Did they say Qunut (supplication after recitation in second Rak’at) in their Salat (prayer )? 5 I replied, ‘Yes, they did . 5 He (the Imam) said, ‘Their Hajj then is complete . 5 He (the Imam) then said, ‘Al- Mash’ar is of al-Muzdalifah and al-Muzdalifah is from al-Mash‘ar; only a little prayer is sufficient for them . ‘“
